title: Order completion disruption isolated to one fulfillment zone
incident_summary: Checkout failures appear intermittent and regional, while several misleading signals suggest a wider dependency problem.

alerts.title: Regional checkout 5xx
alerts.content: 5xx rate hit 23% in az-b while az-a and az-c are near baseline.

alerts.title: Redis latency warning
alerts.content: Shared redis latency elevated by 15ms globally.

alerts.title: DB error blip
alerts.content: Short DB error burst resolved in under two minutes.

alerts.title: AZ-b pod restart burst
alerts.content: Checkout pods in az-b restarted 6x more than other zones.

logs.title: Connection pool maxed in az-b
logs.content: checkout pod template in az-b sets pool_size=15, causing saturation.

logs.title: Autoscaler template drift
logs.content: autoscaler applied outdated pod template only for az-b nodes.

logs.title: Redis timeout retries
logs.content: redis retries increased but stay below user-facing failure thresholds.

runbook_snippets.title: AZ drain and pool restoration
runbook_snippets.content: Drain az-b checkout pods, restore pool_size baseline, and reschedule.

runbook_snippets.title: Global redis failover
runbook_snippets.content: Only apply during cross-AZ redis unavailability.

timeline_notes.title: Template push to az-b
timeline_notes.content: Nodegroup template update at 11:03 UTC impacted only az-b.

timeline_notes.title: Flash sale launch
timeline_notes.content: Flash sale increased load but affected all AZs uniformly.

red_herrings: Global redis latency suggests central dependency issue but incident is AZ-localized.
Brief DB blip happened after primary error spike started.
true_root_cause: Outdated az-b pod template reduced connection pool and caused partial outage
true_root_cause_aliases: az-b checkout pool misconfiguration from template drift
single az autoscaler template caused checkout 5xx
true_mitigation: Drain az-b pods and restore baseline pool settings before rescheduling
true_mitigation_aliases: remove bad az-b template and redeploy checkout pods
drain affected az then fix pool_size configuration
